description.unified: Deals Magic Damage 3 times to enemies in front, knocking them back and reducing their Attack Speed by [15%->30%] and Magic Defense by [10%->35%] for 4 sec. Against non-hero enemies, each hit deals an additional Magic Damage.

Deals Magic Damage to 2 enemies and roots them for [2sec->3.6 sec]. Enemies hit take continuous Magic Damage equal to 18% of Attack Power every 0.5 sec for 6 sec, and their Magic Damage taken is increased by [20%->30%].
Pulls enemies within range toward the center and deals Magic Damage 5 times. The final hit stuns them for [1sec->1.8 sec], and if they are not heroes, deals an additional Magic Damage.

Critical Hit Chance is increased by 150, and each time you deal damage, you inflict [Lea's Curse] on the target for 10 sec. [Lea's Curse]: Critical Hit Chance is reduced by [100->250] and Attack is reduced by [10%->25%].

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but damage dealt is increased by [100%->80%].

dark.unified: Roots the target for [1 sec->1.2 sec].

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [2000->1000], but the target is changed to all enemies.

dark.unified: Root duration is increased by [2 sec->0.9 sec].

light.unified: For 10 sec, the target's Magic Damage taken is increased by [15%->25%].

dark.unified: Mana cost is reduced by 1000. [(removed) damage dealt is increased by 100%.]

light.unified: For each enemy affected by [Lea's Curse], your Attack increases by {2}%. This effect stacks up to {3} times and cannot be dispelled.

dark.unified: Reduces enemy M. Crit Resistance by [20%->25%] for 10 sec.
On critical hit, reduces the target's Status Resistance by [200->250] for 10 sec and reduces the cooldown of all other skills by 2%.

description.unified: Upon a Critical Hit, reduces Heal Rate of the target by [35%->50%] and increases own Crit DMG by {0}% for 10 sec. Crit DMG increase effect can be stacked up to max 20 times.
